name: Vaughn Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat together white sugar, brown sugar, egg, shortening, water, and vanilla until creamy.
3. Sift together flour, salt, and baking soda. Add to creamed mixture and blend well.
4. Stir in oats, then mix in chocolate chips and pecans.
5. Drop by teaspoonsful onto greased cookie sheets.
6. Bake 12 to 15 minutes. The cookies will seem undercooked when removed from the oven but will set up as they cool.
7. Makes five dozen, depending on size.
